description.ko: 정밀한 기하학적 구조와 디지털 혼돈이 결합된 최첨단 시각적 탐구입니다. KURO-X는 파편화된 다각형과 고대비 글리치 효과를 통해 수학적 질서와 시스템 오류 사이의 경계를 탐구합니다.
description.en: A cutting-edge visual exploration merging rigid geometric structures with digital chaos. KURO-X explores the boundary between mathematical order and systemic failure through fragmented polygons and high-contrast glitch effects.

prompt: Futuristic KURO-X branding, high-tech geometric abstraction, sharp polygonal shards, digital glitch distortion, chromatic aberration, data corruption aesthetic, deep obsidian background, neon electric blue and magenta accents, minimalist composition, 8k resolution, cinematic lighting, vector-style sharpness, cyberpunk atmosphere.
